subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved maidservant of His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh! Thy letter was received. Its contents indicated that thou art sad
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
